languages.text: "Если хочешь убедиться в этом сам{mf||а}, то найди его рядом с клетками с безголовыми образцами — я приспособил это костяное убожество для коммуникации".
"If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with the decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for communication."
languages.original_text: "Если хочешь убедиться в этом сам{mf||а}, то найди его рядом с клетками с безголовыми образцами — я приспособил это костяное убожество для коммуникации".

traits.locale_text: "If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for simple transmissions."
"If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for simple transmissions."
"If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with the decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for simple transmissions."
"If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with the decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for simple transmissions."
"If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with the decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for communication."
"If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with the decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for communication."

languages.text: "Falls Ihr Euch selbst überzeugen wollt, findet Ihr ihn neben den Käfigen mit den enthaupteten Versuchsstücken. Ich habe diesen skelettierten Schandfleck für Kommunikation umfunktioniert."
languages.original_text: "If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with the decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for communication."

traits.locale_text: "Falls Ihr Euch selbst überzeugen wollt, findet Ihr ihn neben den Käfigen mit den enthaupteten Versuchsstücken. Ich habe diesen skelettierten Schandfleck für Kommunikation umfunktioniert."

languages.text: « Si vous souhaitez le constater de vos propres yeux, vous trouverez ce misérable crâne près des cages, avec les autres spécimens décapités. Je lui ai trouvé un nouvel usage. Il sert à relayer les communications. »
languages.original_text: "If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with the decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for communication."

traits.locale_text: « Si vous souhaitez le constater de vos propres yeux, vous trouverez ce misérable crâne près des cages, avec les autres spécimens décapités. Je lui ai trouvé un nouvel usage. Il sert à relayer les communications. »

languages.text: «Si quieres verlo por ti mismo, lo encontrarás junto a las jaulas de los especímenes decapitados. He reutilizado ese engendro esquelético para su uso en comunicaciones».
languages.original_text: "If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with the decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for communication."

traits.locale_text: «Si quieres verlo por ti mismo, lo encontrarás junto a las jaulas de los especímenes decapitados. He reutilizado ese engendro esquelético para su uso en comunicaciones».

languages.text: "Kendi gözlerinle görmek istersen onu başı kesilmiş numunelerin olduğu kafeslerin yanında bulabilirsin. O göz tırmalayan iskeleti, iletişim kuracak şekilde yeniden tasarladım."
languages.original_text: "If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with the decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for communication."

traits.locale_text: "Kendi gözlerinle görmek istersen onu başı kesilmiş numunelerin olduğu kafeslerin yanında bulabilirsin. O göz tırmalayan iskeleti, iletişim kuracak şekilde yeniden tasarladım."

languages.text: “你要是想亲眼看看，可以在那些无头标本的笼子旁边找到它。我已经把那副碍眼的骨壳改造成了沟通工具。”
languages.original_text: "If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with the decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for communication."

traits.locale_text: “你要是想亲眼看看，可以在那些无头标本的笼子旁边找到它。我已经把那副碍眼的骨壳改造成了沟通工具。”

languages.text: 「ご自身でご覧になりたい場合は、首が切られた標本が置かれているケージの隣にございます。私はその骨格の醜いものを通信に転用しました。」
languages.original_text: "If you care to see it for yourself, you will find it beside the cages with the decapitated specimens. I have repurposed that skeletal eyesore for communication."

traits.locale_text: 「ご自身でご覧になりたい場合は、首が切られた標本が置かれているケージの隣にございます。私はその骨格の醜いものを通信に転用しました。」
